caption: A person wearing a dark, plaid button-down shirt is shown interacting with a white, matte-finish bottle. In the first scene, the person holds the bottle in one hand and uses the other to secure a black cap onto the top. In the next scene, white graphic lines appear around the cap area to emphasize the seal, and the on-screen text "WITH LEAK FREE DESIGN" appears in white lettering. The third scene shows the person continuing to twist and tighten the black cap onto the white bottle. In the final scene, the person is seen wearing a dark jacket over their shirt, holding the bottle near their chest. Throughout the sequence, the focus remains on the person's hands and the bottle against a blurred indoor background.
